summary: Tested 2 new features: (1) Favorites Page - complete e2e testing of empty state, venue cards display, remove/clear-all functionality, navigation, and localStorage persistence. (2) Dashboard Mobile Responsiveness - hamburger menu and sidebar functionality at 375px viewport. All tests PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: FavoritesPage.js correctly reads from localStorage key 'favoriteVenues' and fetches venue data via POST /api/venues/batch
Venue cards display all required fields: name, city, area, rating, venue_type badge, price (pricing.price_per_plate_veg), capacity
Remove button correctly updates both React state and localStorage
Clear All button removes all favorites from localStorage and UI
Empty state with 'No favorites yet' message and 'Browse Venues' CTA working correctly
Header heart icon (data-testid='header-favorites-btn') visible and links to /favorites
User dropdown 'My Favorites' menu item (data-testid='nav-favorites') links to /favorites
DashboardLayout mobile sidebar uses translate-x-0/-translate-x-full CSS transitions - working correctly
Mobile padding is reduced to p-3 on small screens (line 232 of DashboardLayout.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Favorites feature uses localStorage key 'favoriteVenues' (array of venue_id strings). FavoritesPage fetches full venue data via POST /api/venues/batch. Key data-testids: favorites-empty, favorites-browse-btn, favorites-grid, favorites-back-btn, favorites-clear-all, favorite-venue-{venue_id}, remove-favorite-{venue_id}, header-favorites-btn, nav-favorites. Mobile sidebar toggle: data-testid='mobile-sidebar-toggle'.

backend_tests.POST /api/venues/batch with valid IDs: PASS - Returns venue data with name, city, area, pricing, rating, venue_type

favorites_page_tests.TEST 1 - Empty state display: PASS - 'No favorites yet' message shown with data-testid='favorites-empty'
favorites_page_tests.TEST 4 - Favorites grid with venues: PASS - Grid displays when localStorage has favorites
favorites_page_tests.TEST 5 - Venue card display: PASS - Shows name, city/area, rating (4.8), venue_type (hotel), price (4.5K/plate), capacity (50-1500)
favorites_page_tests.TEST 7 - Clear All button: PASS - data-testid='favorites-clear-all' visible when venues exist
favorites_page_tests.TEST 9 - Remove functionality: PASS - Removes venue from grid and localStorage
favorites_page_tests.TEST 10 - Clear All functionality: PASS - Clears all favorites from localStorage and shows empty state

header_favorites_tests.TEST 13 - My Favorites in user dropdown: PASS - data-testid='nav-favorites' shows 'My Favorites' linking to /favorites

mobile_dashboard_tests.TEST 14 - Dashboard at 375px viewport: PASS - Cards render properly with reduced padding
mobile_dashboard_tests.TEST 16 - Sidebar opens on click: PASS - Sidebar becomes visible with translate-x-0, shows all 11 nav items, dark overlay appears
